response: [1] The parametric equations describe an ellipsoid with semi-axes a a and b. [2] The surface area formula for such a shape involves elliptic integrals unless a equals b. [3] Assuming a equals b simplifies the shape to a sphere with radius a. [4] The surface area of a sphere is four pi times the radius squared. [5] Setting four pi a squared equal to 1000 yields a value for a. [6] Solving this gives a approximately equal to 8.92 and b equals 8.92. [7] The conductivity function sigma depends on the distance from the origin squared. [8] On the surface of this sphere the distance squared is constant and equals a squared. [9] Therefore the total conductivity is the product of c a squared and the surface area. [10] Substituting c equals 0.5 and the area equals 1000 gives the final result. [11] The total electrical conductivity across the surface is 4460 units.
